ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Current version of the application */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., web service, API) */,
  "deployment_environment" TEXT /* Deployment environment (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the application */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for maintaining the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being monitored */,
  "req_per_sec" INTEGER /* Request rate per second */,
  "response_time_99th_concurrent" INTEGER /* 99th percentile response time under concurrent load (ms) */,
  "response_time_99th_serial" INTEGER /* 99th percentile response time under serial load (ms) */,
  "cpu_usage_concurrent" REAL /* CPU usage percentage under concurrent load */,
  "cpu_usage_serial" REAL /* CPU usage percentage under serial load */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were recorded */,
  "memory_usage_concurrent" REAL /* Memory usage percentage under concurrent load */,
  "memory_usage_serial" REAL /* Memory usage percentage under serial load */,
  "load_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the load condition under which metrics were collected */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of requests that resulted in errors */,
  "throughput" INTEGER /* Number of successful requests processed per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_load_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_condition_id") REFERENCES load_conditions ("load_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_conditions" (
  "load_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the load condition (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description_detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the load condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the load condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the load condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Alert, Warning) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the issue */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was issued */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., login, view metrics, generate report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dashboard was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dashboard */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dashboard is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_metrics" (
  "dashboard_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard-metric association */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "display_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the metric should be displayed on the dashboard */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., CPU usage, response time) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the metric is visible on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_metrics_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical metric records */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application for which metrics are recorded */,
  "req_per_sec" INTEGER /* Request rate per second */,
  "response_time_99th_concurrent" INTEGER /* 99th percentile response time under concurrent load (ms) */,
  "response_time_99th_serial" INTEGER /* 99th percentile response time under serial load (ms) */,
  "cpu_usage_concurrent" REAL /* CPU usage percentage under concurrent load */,
  "cpu_usage_serial" REAL /* CPU usage percentage under serial load */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for historical data record */,
  "memory_usage_concurrent" REAL /* Memory usage percentage under concurrent load */,
  "memory_usage_serial" REAL /* Memory usage percentage under serial load */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of requests that resulted in errors */,
  "throughput" INTEGER /* Number of successful requests processed per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold definition */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application associated with the threshold */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., CPU usage, response time) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers notifications */,
  "notification_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if notifications are enabled for this threshold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the threshold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_thresholds_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the feedback is related to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Feedback message provided by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application for which resources are allocated */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being allocated (e.g., CPU, Memory) */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount of resource allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of allocation */,
  "is_auto_scaled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource allocation is auto-scaled */,
  "scaling_policy" TEXT /* Description of the scaling policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type (e.g., Web Service, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the service type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)
